atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports persistent left shoulder pain for the past month

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by overhead activities

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient reports left shoulder pain exacerbated by prolonged arm elevation

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient denies any recent injury or trauma

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as a dull ache

atomic_propositions.speaker: patient
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient describes the pain as occasional sharp spikes

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals mild tenderness to palpation over the anterior shoulder

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals limited range of motion in abduction and external rotation

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: Physical examination reveals positive impingement signs

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The patient's presentation is most consistent with subacromial impingement syndrome

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician prescribes a course of NSAIDs for pain management.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician refers to physical therapy.

atomic_propositions.speaker: clinician
atomic_propositions.proposition_text: The clinician plans a follow-up appointment in 4 weeks.
